name: immunization-schedule
title: Immunization Schedule
description: VaccinationRecordRows grouped into collapsible sections with per-group and overall due/overdue counts.

props.name: groups
props.description: { label, rows: VaccinationRecordRowProps[], defaultOpen? }[], in display order.

clinicalNotes: Group order follows the national schedule the caller passes in — the component imposes no schedule of its own, because immunization schedules are jurisdiction-specific. Each section header and the overall summary lead with what needs action (overdue, then due), and sections with due/overdue items default to open so nothing actionable is hidden behind a collapsed header. Status is shown as a text count ("1 overdue"), never by color alone. Per-vaccine status and dating are the caller's responsibility; this composes VaccinationRecordRow for the row-level detail.
notes: medcn-original. Composes vaccination-record-row + collapsible; server component rendering client Collapsible children.
